artefacts.data_model_amendment: v5.2 (2026-06-08): added BusinessCalendar entity (§5.2.46) — Stage-3/ADR-6 follow-up, folded into initial schema pre-deployment, re-validated; Gate B remains satisfied (47 tables).

lld.pattern: FR-NNN.md + FR-NNN-tests.md per FR (tier in each file header)
lld.stage6_hardening: v5.3 (2026-06-09): resolved technical ambiguities + foundation-LLD spot-review drift. schema += grant_status 'pending' / event_code 'DUPLICATE_FLAGGED' / audit_action 'abac_deny' / users.totp_secret_enc; api-contract += bulk-action, break-glass revoke, audit unmask, leads ?q; env += 2 vars; shared-utilities pinned AuditAppender.append + OutboxService.emit signatures, added LeadService.bulkReassign + CaptchaService. Re-validated (schema LOAD_EXIT=0 + YAML 65 paths). Foundation LLDs FR-052/010/130/140/071/081 corrected.
lld.generated_by: lld-generator via parallel workflow (Sonnet); FR-104-tests.md authored directly after a stream-timeout
lld.verification: All 98 files present; contract-correctness sweep clean (no 422/UNAUTHORISED/EXTERNAL_SERVICE_ERROR/requireAuth/src-app-api/ORM).

history.note: Item 4 FAIL: FRs referenced undefined entities StageHistory/Note/ImportJob.

caveats: Tracked open decisions (do not block Gate A; required before integration build): OD-08 select PAN/CKYC/DigiLocker/comms/CTI vendors; OD-17 complete TRAI-DLT + WhatsApp-WABA messaging registration.

Council pre-dispatch hardening follow-ups (Stage 3+/architecture+contracts, not Gate-A items): LeadService mutator interface, unit-of-work/transaction-propagation pattern, versioned LOS mock contract, BusinessCalendar entity, DPDPA-erasure-vs-immutable-audit design. See docs/evaluations/lms-brd-v5-council-report-2026-06-05.md.

B.live_validation: Loaded clean on PostgreSQL 18 (ON_ERROR_STOP exit 0); live in local lms_dev DB. 46 tables, 69 enums, 194 FKs.
caveats: Business confirmations (not blockers): #1 single-tenant MVP, #3 leads.product_code+product_config_id, #5 migration channel out of scope.
Legal/DPO required before customer self-service go-live: #6 consent-bootstrap lawful basis.
Stage 3 (architecture) follow-ups flagged by council: audit hash-chain single-writer serialization (#9); BusinessCalendar/WorkingHours source for SLA/TAT (#10).
See docs/data-model/DATA_MODEL.md Assumptions & Gaps (14 items) and docs/evaluations/lms-brd-v5-council-report-2026-06-05.md.

C.validation: api-contract.yaml parsed valid via npx js-yaml (Node v24, exit 0, 62 paths); auth-matrix.json valid JSON (9 roles, 47 resources, 14 public). FR coverage 49/49; status-enum coverage 22/22. A real YAML defect (flow-sequence braces in x-fr-coverage) was caught and fixed during the gate.
fixes_during_gate: x-fr-coverage flow sequences -> quoted strings (YAML validity)
added delivery/scan/validation/attribution status enums to state-machines.md

OD-06 (Legal/DPO): consent-bootstrap lawful basis for first outbound message — resolve before customer self-service go-live.

stage7.cadence: auto-merge within a wave after independent re-verify + reviewer agent; pause at wave boundaries
stage7.build_order: architecture §12 (foundation -> core domain -> workflow -> integration-dependent -> read models)
stage7.test_strategy: Per-FR unit + component coverage is REQUIRED and gated at merge (independent build/test re-verify + a reviewer sub-agent). The Testcontainers integration/e2e tier is DEFERRED to a dedicated integration-test wave run after the domain FRs are merged (many scenarios span multiple not-yet-built FRs and need the DB harness). Tracked per-FR in each FR-NNN-tests.md.

FR-104 SLA engine + BusinessCalendar + policy admin — 58efab4
FR-140 IntegrationGateway + LOS/KYC ports + webhooks — b782c1e

stage7.wave_1_foundation: COMPLETE — all core/ infra + M1 identity (FR-001/002/003) + M14 admin (FR-130/131/132) + M5 product-config (FR-040/041/042) + cross-cutting FR-104/123/140/141
stage7.parallel_execution: Later FRs built in parallel batches in isolated git worktrees (junctioned node_modules), reviewed per-FR by sub-agents, cherry-picked to master, app.module wired centrally; 0 merge conflicts.
stage7.cross_fr_review_items: master-resource ownership overlaps (FR-131 vs partners/M10, communication-templates/M11, allocation-rules/M4, retention-policies/M12); regions/branches capability (user_mgmt vs configuration); lead-attach endpoints (scheme attach, etc.) deferred to capture FRs (FR-010/011/050).
stage7.next_wave: Wave 2 — core domain: M2 capture (incl. LeadService sole-writer + stage-history), M3 dedupe, M4 allocation+scoring
stage7.later_waves: Wave 2 core domain (capture/dedupe/allocation incl. LeadService), Wave 3 workflow (KYC/self-service/compliance/engagement), Wave 4 integration (LOS/partner), Wave 5 read models (workspace/reporting)
